- [commitment|c=0.95|i=0.85] Northwind committed to sign the annual contract by March 28 if SOC2 evidence is included.
- [fact|c=0.90|i=0.85] Pricing agreed at $48K setup plus $4K monthly support.

## 2024-01-03

- [decision|c=0.95|i=0.85] Use PostgreSQL for durable event storage and Redis for short-lived queue state.
- [preference|c=0.90|i=0.60] Keep search terms like "Compressor", "keyword preservation", and "Project Atlas" untouched.
- [todo|c=0.95|i=0.80] Add regression test that fails when PostgreSQL or Redis terms disappear from observations.
- [task|c=0.95|i=0.85] Publish v3.4.0 after CI passes and update the changelog.
- [relationship|c=0.90|i=0.50] Maya approved shipping behind the benchmark feature flag.
